name: Harpys Deadend
description: Varrio Harpys are a predominately Latino Street gang located in the West Adams section in South Los Angeles. The gang formed in the 1960s in the area north of the University of Southern California near downtown Los Angeles. The gang is divided into two main identities; the Dead End Harpys and the Wild Bunch (WB). Under those two identities exist several cliques of the gang.
